Appearances:
Maureen McGowan, Esq. for Petitioner: Lee P. Kirk present as guardian ad litem for Joseph Dillion Soares and Thomas Jenner Soares, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise for each minor as follows:
Attorney's fees: $47,352.55 and $702.12 for litigation expenses for each minor.
Settlement procees shall be distributed to "The Soares Settlement Irrevocable Trust Agreement" to be admisistered for each minor. Bond of the Trustee is set at $150,000.00 for each minor. See scanned Attachment to Order Approving Compromise of Claim of Minor.
Orders signed in court.
